title: Reasons Why Monster Beverage (MNST) Should be in Your Portfolio
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) is poised to benefit from strong product demand, product innovations and effective pricing actions.

title: 3 High-Flying Stocks Set to Soar Even Higher
text: According to Finviz.com yesterday, 119 S&P 500 stocks were trading within 5% of their 52-week high. While I won't go through all 119 to list stocks reaching record highs, I will deliver three possibilities.

title: Better Buy: Celsius vs. Monster Beverage
text: Celsius shares are trading at a frothy price, largely because the market loves new-story stocks. Monster Beverage is a far larger and more stable business that's already firmly profitable.

title: Why AI Is Revolutionizing the Consumer Goods Industry, and How to Profit From It
text: Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming traditional business sectors, boosting customer engagement and operational efficiency. The strategic adoption of AI can help companies maintain customer loyalty and gain a competitive advantage.

title: Better Buy: Coca-Cola vs. Monster Beverage
text: Both of these beverage companies are highly profitable. Coke stock comes with a dividend bonus.

title: 3 Lesser-Known Stocks That Could Make You Rich
text: Mega-cap tech stocks and household brands seem to get all the attention from analysts, investors and the media. This is a shame, because there are many lesser-known stocks that have racked up huge gains in both the short and long-terms, and beaten the broader market by a wide margin.

title: Monster Beverage Announces Webcast Details for Annual Meeting of Stockholders
text: CORONA, Calif., June 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) announced today that the Company will host a live webcast of its Annual Meeting of Stockholders on Thursday, June 22, 2023. The live webcast will start at 2:30 p.m. Pacific Time.

title: Here's Why You Must Buy Monster Beverage (MNST) Stock Now
text: Monster Beverage's (MNST) continued momentum in the energy drinks category is a key growth driver. It is on track with price increases to wean the ongoing cost pressures.

title: Celsius Jumps Nearly 5% As Piper Sandler Boosts Price Target
text: For many consumers, energy drinks have evolved into a product characterized as “must haves,” which fall under the consumer staples category. One of the category leaders, in terms of sales and earnings growth, as well as stock price appreciation, is Celsius Holdings Inc. NASDAQ: CELH.
